data.title: Azure Will Reaccelerate Amid AI Ramp Up, Analyst Says: Microsoft 'One Of The Most Compelling Investment Opportunities'
data.description: Microsoft will benefit from Azure investment and AI push according to Goldman Sachs analyst, with a possible $200 billion business by 2029.

data.title: JPMorgan Earnings Are Imminent; These Most Accurate Analysts Revise Forecasts Ahead Of Earnings Call
Corebridge Enhances Retirement Solutions With MarketLock Annuity
data.description: Corebridge Financial, Inc. (NYSE: CRBG) recently launched its new retirement product, Corebridge MarketLock Annuity, through its American General Life Insurance subsidiary.

data.title: Here's How Much $1000 Invested In PDD Holdings 5 Years Ago Would Be Worth Today
Why Is Cancer-Focused Immatics Stock Trading Lower On Thursday?
data.description: Immatics announced updated Phase 1b data for its IMA203 therapy in metastatic melanoma. A deep tumor reduction response was observed in about half of the patients, with positive survival benefits shown. Phase 3 trials are set to begin by December 2024.
